title: Sweet and Sour Prawns
description: A twist on traditional Chinese stir-fry, this dish combines succulent prawns with a tangy sweet and sour sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the prawns and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the prawns from the wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the cooked rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cumin and stir-fry for another minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar and sugar.
Pour the sweet and sour sauce over the rice and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Return the prawns to the wok and stir-fry until coated with the sauce.
Serve immediately over the cooked rice.
